candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line and preferred over balancing/other revenue rows.
Revenue-related line but appears supplemental and not the primary top-line.
Balancing row, not appropriate when direct revenue exists.
Balancing row, not appropriate when direct revenue exists.

variables.notes: Selected the primary sales line as revenue. Did not use Total operating income because revenue rule prefers the direct revenue line and candidate list contains Net Sales.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; this appears to represent cost of materials and purchased services, analogous to cost of sales.

variables.notes: Candidate list was empty. Chose from full A-column labels because 'Material and purchased services' clearly appears to be the cost-of-sales/direct-cost line. Manual review flagged because this was outside the provided candidate list.

candidates.why: Operating overhead component; fits SG&A-style external/admin costs.
Could be overhead-related but appears sparse/unclear compared with the main external cost line.
Operating overhead/personnel expense component; commonly part of SG&A.
Catch-all overhead bucket and valid SG&A component, excluding D&A/finance/tax.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected best overhead components from candidate list and excluded COGS ('Material and purchased services'), depreciation/amortization, impairments, and finance items. Excluded 'Other Other External Costs' because it appears unclear/supplemental.
No clear R&D/research and development row appears in the provided statements.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on loans and leasing
candidates.why: Most direct and specific interest expense line; preferred when available.
Standard interest expense line used in prior years; good fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component only, narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure and likely duplicate/sign-adjusted presentation, not preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on loans and leasing

variables.notes: Used a priority list for label changes over time. Excluded lease-interest-only rows because they are partial/supplemental rather than the main interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the Parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Owner/parent equity excluding non-controlling interests; ideal BE concept.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the company
candidates.why: Owner equity excluding NCI; also ideal and more complete across years.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred because BE should exclude MIB.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the company - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not appropriate as BE.
Balancing row, not appropriate as BE.
Balancing row, not appropriate as BE.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not appropriate as BE.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the company
Equity attributable to the Parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Selected owner/parent equity lines as priority list because BE should exclude non-controlling interests. Did not use Total Equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.
Income statement allocation/comprehensive income line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line; preferred MIB mapping.
Equivalent balance-sheet NCI line; good fallback.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet NCI labels only, as required to pair with BE excluding NCI.
